ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: OpenHospi needs access to your camera to take profile and room photos.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OpenHospi needs access to your photo library to upload profile and room photos.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: OpenHospi would like to save photos to your photo library.
ios.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: OpenHospi does not track you. We only use crash reports to improve the app.
